answers: Character design is the art of creating original characters for games, animation, comics, or film. It involves defining their appearance, personality, backstory, and visual style to make them memorable and appealing.
Character design holo unique character toiri kora — tader look, personality, costume, color palette shob design kora. Silhouette strong hole character memorable hoy.

Start with a strong silhouette — your character should be recognizable even as a shadow. Use shape language (circles = friendly, triangles = dangerous, squares = strong) to communicate personality visually.

The character design process includes research, thumbnail sketches, silhouette exploration, refining the best concepts, adding details and color, and creating a character sheet with expressions and poses.
